nodes.name: 南島 (新西蘭)
nodes.summary: 南島 (新西蘭)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括白眶几维、New Zealand grebe、Spotless crake等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 新西兰
nodes.summary: 新西兰是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联27种鸟类，包括白眶几维、澳洲潜鸭、太平洋黑鴨等27种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 查塔姆群岛
nodes.summary: 查塔姆群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Spotless crake、Double-banded plover、Grey-backed storm petrel等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 污染
nodes.summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

nodes.name: 鹤形目
nodes.summary: 鹤形目（Gruiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联126种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、灰冠鹤、Grey-winged trumpeter等126种鸟类。

nodes.name: 秧鸡科
nodes.summary: 秧鸡科（Rallidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Tsingy forest rail、Madagascar forest rail、Chestnut forest rail等103种鸟类。

nodes.name: Spotless crake
nodes.summary: Spotless crake（Spotless crake，学名 Zapornia tabuensis），分类上属于鹤形目，并归入秧鸡科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于查塔姆群岛、新西兰、南島 (新西蘭)，常见栖息地包括沼泽、湿地，主要威胁包括污染。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Fossils of the spotless crake from the Holocene period have also been found on the mainland, as well as the Chatham Islands. Because the spotless crake is rarely seen, it is hard to determine what the population size is, so currently population numbers are unknown in New Zealand. It is believed that the reason spotless crake are rarely found in the South Island, New Zealand is due to the more dominant rail the marsh crake pushing the spotless crake out of suitable habitat, as the natural habitat of the two species are very similar

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Fossils of the spotless crake from the Holocene period have also been found on the mainland, as well as the Chatham Islands. Because the spotless crake is rarely seen, it is hard to determine what the population size is, so currently population numbers are unknown in New Zealand. It is believed that the reason spotless crake are rarely found in the South Island, New Zealand is due to the more dominant rail the marsh crake pushing the spotless crake out of suitable habitat, as the natural habitat of the two species are very similar

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Another reason may be that spotless crakes are not as tolerant of the colder climates of the South Island, being mainly found in warmer coastal localities. Spotless crakes are freshwater wetland birds

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Water pollution and degradation of wetlands due to grazing are also major threats. thumbtime=10|300px|left|SE Queensland, Australia
